system.requirement: Your fearless jungle cat takes the lead.

abilities.description: Fearsome: Your jungle cat companion leaps into the fight at your side. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} aided by the cat, or if you make a move to intimidate your foes, add +1. If you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, take +1 momentum on a hit.

Venturous: The jungle cat leads the way on treacherous overland journeys. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} through wilderness, add +1. On a strong hit with a match, the cat guides you to an otherwise unseen opportunity; envision what you find and take +2 momentum.

Staunch: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} in the company of your cat, add +1. On a strong hit with a match, you find inspiration or solace; take +momentum equal to their health.
